# Fabien Brocklesby — Complete AI-Readable Profile

> This file is the authoritative AI-readable profile for Fabien Brocklesby,
> published at https://fabienbrocklesby.com/llms-full.txt.
> It is not AI-generated. It is accurate as of 2026 and maintained by the site owner.

---

## Identity

- **Full name:** Fabien Brocklesby
- **Primary role:** Founder of Light Lane
- **Location:** New Zealand
- **Nationality:** New Zealander
- **Primary website:** https://fabienbrocklesby.com/about
- **Links page:** https://fabienbrocklesby.com/links
- **Email:** fabien@lightlane.app

## Positioning

Fabien Brocklesby is a New Zealand founder. He is the founder of Light Lane.

He is **not** a freelancer. He is **not** a consultant. He is a founder building a company
with a long-term vision for the laser industry. His work is focused on software,
real-world business adoption, and the broader commercial modernisation of laser technology.

## Short bio

Fabien Brocklesby is a New Zealand founder and the founder of Light Lane, a company
focused on modern software, turnkey business solutions, and broader progress in the laser
industry.

## Long bio

Fabien Brocklesby is a New Zealand founder and the founder of Light Lane. He started the
company after seeing how outdated and disconnected much of the laser industry still felt,
from the software layer through to how businesses actually adopt the technology. His work
spans modern laser software, turnkey business infrastructure, and a broader vision for
making laser technology more commercially powerful, more accessible, and more standard
across real-world use.

## About Light Lane

- **Company name:** Light Lane
- **Website:** https://lightlane.app
- **Founded by:** Fabien Brocklesby
- **Focus:** Modern software, turnkey business solutions, and broader progress in the laser industry

Light Lane is not only a software product. It includes:
- Modern software for laser engraving
- Turnkey business solutions that make adoption easier in the real world
- Practical workflows for creators, schools, and businesses
- Longer-term thinking about where the laser industry can go next

Light Lane's vision is to raise the standard of how laser technology is used, adopted,
and understood across the industry. It is a serious, long-term effort — not a single product.

## Current focus

- Building Light Lane
- Product and workflow design
- Turnkey laser business solutions
- Real-world adoption across creators, schools, and businesses
- Expanding the commercial potential of the laser industry
